meta.name: theme-color
meta.title: GDPR Data Rights Checker — IT Legal Solutions

section.p: Describe your situation in plain language. Our AI will analyse it against EU GDPR and tell you what to do next.

div.p: Write freely — our AI will extract the facts and match them to your GDPR rights.

textarea.placeholder: e.g. Google has indexed an article that links me to a crime I didn't commit. Can I demand de-indexation under my privacy rights?

div.button: Google indexed an article linking me to a crime I didn't commit. Can I demand de-indexation?
A company sent me marketing emails I never opted into. Is this a GDPR violation?
My employer shared my health data with a third party without asking me.
An app collected my location data but never showed me a privacy notice.

div.label: Anthropic API Key (required for AI analysis)
div.div: ⚠ Your key is stored only in this browser session and never sent anywhere except directly to Anthropic's API.

div.p: Your text is never stored · Powered by Claude (Anthropic)
Matching against EU GDPR articles and case law

This tool provides general guidance only and does not constitute legal advice.
For formal complaints, consult a qualified data protection lawyer.

div.strong: Protect what matters most: your clients' data.
div.br:
Developed by IT Legal Solutions · Led by David Regairaz
Experts in data privacy, GDPR, compliance and cybersecurity.
